\tzpentry{ID3344}{Chsh Action Laplacian Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3344 introduces Chsh Action Laplacian Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} S_{ \text{CHSH}}(t, \Omega) = 2 \sqrt{2} \exp[- \Gamma_{ \text{dec}}( \Omega) t] | \cos[ \Delta \Phi( \Omega, t)]| \end{equation}
